evidence: xcodebuild through the active developer directory failed because xcode-select pointed at /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools instead of full Xcode.

Running /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr/bin/xcodebuild exposed the project error: IBVaultApp.swift could not find StudyPlan because StudyPlan.swift and the Study views were missing from the target sources.
After wiring those files into the project, the remaining failures were SwiftUI foregroundStyle ternaries in the Study views that mixed Color with hierarchical ShapeStyle values.

tests.cmd: '/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr/bin/xcodebuild' -project IBVault.xcodeproj -scheme IBVault -configuration Debug -sdk macosx CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
